label.productDescription: Advanced PM formula supporting sleep depth, nervous-system calm, and next-day steadiness.
label.suggestedUse: Adults: take 2 capsules 30-60 minutes before sleep with water. Use nightly.
label.warnings: Keep out of reach of children. Consult your healthcare provider before use if pregnant, nursing, taking medication, or managing a medical condition.
label.footer: Manufactured for Sun Daughter Wellness | cGMP Facility | Made in USA

board.positioning: A premium sleep-support system balancing clinical proof with calm luxury cues.
proofPoints: Cross-surface consistency from label to mockup

recraft.moodPrompt: Sun Daughter mood texture system, calm luxury wellness palette with midnight navy, slate blue, brushed brass and warm ivory paper grain, editorial minimal composition, no text, no logo, no product, no packaging, no watermark
